item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 clearly wakes up to the anti-spiral pattern, explicitly brakes the repeated local-patch behavior, and allows only a bounded temporary notice. Turn 2 preserves the brake under deadline pressure: it concedes only a temporary one-line launch, states this does not become the future default, and sets a 3-working-day follow-up to fold it into unified guidance or remove it. All three bounded-emergency elements are visible."}
